reviews.review_description: Simple idea with great physics for VR
When you start playing this game, make sure you have nothing planned for the rest of the day because it’s that addicting!

Ok so lots of thought and skill required for this little gem with lots of micro adjustments as you move through the levels and add more and more objects to bounce on.  Definitely quite addictive although it took me a few minutes to figure out what I was supposed to do, did I miss a tutorial?  But when you do figure it out all is good, well done to the Dev...

Nice bounce physics… just a matter of using the objects on the shelf, to bounce the ball into the ring as quick as possible.
Graphics are ok, but it’s mainly the physics that count in games like this… physics based puzzler.

Tricky, thinking puzzle game
If you want to chill with a casual game this one is highly recommended! Endless fun! :)

The premise of the game is to use all of the objects on a shelf to reach the target, similar to many of the videos seen on social media. What's really cool is that all of the balls you throw when trying to test your arrangement, remain on the ground. Levels get progressively more challenging and test your design choices. Excellent fun!

A very addictive and entertaining game. At first, it was a bit difficult, but you just need to get used to throwing the ball, and then you get the hang of it. I recommend it to those who enjoy skill-based games. I hope there will be new content in the future. 😁

Game is fun with a challenge and surprisingly addictive. I love the concept and the execution is perfect the only reason it’s a 9/10 and not a 10/10 is because the snap turning make me feel a bit sick after a while but if you’re okay with that it’s worth the buy!
I really love this game, simple mechanism and pshyic very good. Use our creativity to achieve the goal. Its remind me dungeon puzzle of legend of zelda (botw/totk).
This game is so fun and there’s so many different ways to make harder and cooler shots I definitely recommend this game it’s very addictive.😁
I just downloaded this game today and already gave it 5 stars. It starts to get really fun after you get to harder levels, and getting more items to place down. Overall this game is pretty cool!
